description: unmountCodeMirrorForNote bypassed on Escape and blur exit: exitEditMode clears currentEditingNoteId to null before the $effect cleanup fires unmountCodeMirrorForNote, causing the guard check at feedRowEditMode.ts:173-176 to fail. The EditorView is never destroyed, leaking DOM event listeners, internal CodeMirror state, and violating REQ-005 item 2 ('Unmount (destroy) the CodeMirror EditorView instance — clean up DOM node, remove event listeners, free memory').

secondaryEvidence.description: handleEditorEscape calls exitInlineEdit(noteId) which nullifies currentEditingNoteId BEFORE $effect cleanup (line 211-214) runs unmountCodeMirrorForNote
handleEditorBlur wraps exitInlineEdit in setTimeout, causing same timing issue: currentEditingNoteId cleared before unmountCodeMirrorForNote fires
exitEditMode unconditionally nullifies currentEditingNoteId at line 218 before the Svelte $effect re-evaluates
